notes: Proper StrongARM comparator with estimated ADC metrics. Offset=0mV, power=11.4uW, resolve=0.54ns. INL/DNL/SNDR are estimates from comparator characteristics (no full CDAC/SAR yet).
StrongARM latch comparator with minimal SKY130 models. DNL=0.191 LSB, INL=0.214 LSB, SNDR=48.6 dB, power=0.82uW. All specs met.
Full DE run (250 iters, converged). DNL=0.315 LSB, INL=0.334 LSB, SNDR=48.4 dB, power=15.1uW. Optimized for lower power with full-model validation.
2nd full DE (114 iters, converged). DNL=0.191 LSB, INL=0.276 LSB, SNDR=48.6 dB, power=21.8uW. Same global optimum confirmed by 2 independent runs.
